name: InfraNodus MCP Server
what_it_does: InfraNodus MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with InfraNodus — the AI-powered knowledge graph and text analytics platform — analyzing text networks, discovering insight gaps, identifying key topics, and integrating InfraNodus's unique network-based approach to knowledge visualization into agent-driven research and content strategy workflows.
use_cases: Analyzing text collections for knowledge gaps from research agents
Identifying key topics and concepts in document sets from analysis agents
Discovering structural patterns in knowledge from insight agents
Building topic maps for content strategy from planning agents
Network analysis of concepts and their relationships from research agents
Identifying blind spots in research or content from strategic agents
not_for: Simple keyword search (InfraNodus provides structural/network analysis, not keyword search)
Teams not needing knowledge graph visualization
Real-time text processing (InfraNodus is for analytical workflows)
best_when: A researcher or content strategist needs to understand the structure and gaps in a text corpus — InfraNodus's network-based analysis reveals non-obvious connections and missing topics.
avoid_when: You need simple document search or standard keyword analysis — InfraNodus is specialized for network/structural text analysis.

auth.notes: InfraNodus API key required. Available from InfraNodus account settings. Works with both cloud and self-hosted InfraNodus.

pricing.free_tier_limits: InfraNodus: free tier with limited graphs
pricing.notes: Official MCP from noduslabs (InfraNodus creators). Free tier available. Paid for advanced features.

known_agent_gotchas: Network/graph analysis concepts require agent context to interpret results correctly
Free tier graph limit can be hit quickly in active use
Official MCP from noduslabs — InfraNodus is an unusual analytics approach
Results are richer when agents understand network topology concepts
InfraNodus's value is in visual network analysis — text output loses some nuance
Large text corpora analysis can be slow
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. Official MCP from noduslabs. Text data sent to InfraNodus servers.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. Official MCP. Text sent to InfraNodus servers.
